_README: Add or remove entries below to control what gets watched. Look up CIKs at https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany. Pad to 10 digits with leading zeros. After editing, delete state.json (or set first_run_done=false) to re-seed without spam.

_form_types_reference.4: Insider trade by officer/director/10%+ holder (2 BD after trade)
_form_types_reference.SC 13D: Activist 5%+ stake (5 BD after acquisition; was 10 BD pre-Feb-2024)
_form_types_reference.SC 13G: Passive 5%+ stake (5 BD passive; up to 45 days for QIIs)
_form_types_reference.13F-HR: Hedge fund / institutional manager quarterly holdings (45 days post-quarter)

_form_match_behavior: Filter matches exact form OR form + '/A' (amendments). So forms: ['SC 13D'] catches both 'SC 13D' and 'SC 13D/A'.
_congress_members_help: List of name substrings to match against Capitol Trades politician strings. Case-insensitive. Use last names for the prolific traders (Pelosi, Crenshaw, Tuberville) or full names for ambiguous ones. Empty list = match ALL politicians. Used by congress_watcher.py.
